_comment: Donate page copy, including the PayPal donate link and impact amounts.

seo.title: Donate · Sakyadhita
seo.description: Support Sakyadhita's work for Buddhist women worldwide — conference scholarships, the newsletter, ordination advocacy, and branch development. Tax-deductible 501(c)3 donations.

hero.title: Your gift sustains 35+ years of work
hero.lede: Sakyadhita is a 501(c)3 nonprofit, volunteer-run. Your contribution goes directly to conference scholarships, the newsletter, ordination advocacy, and branch development.

impact.heading: Your impact
impact.lede: Every gift makes a difference, and even $5 goes a long way. Your contribution helps sustain our mission by funding the newsletter, sponsoring conference scholarships, and advancing ordination advocacy across all traditions.

cards.text: Funds full conference travel for one nun from a developing country.
Supports a year of ordination advocacy programming.

taxNote.text: Sakyadhita International is a registered 501(c)3 non-profit in the United States. Donations from U.S. taxpayers are tax-deductible. EIN available on request.

cards.title: Join Us
cards.text: Become a member of our global network. Member tiers start at $15 USD.

cards.title: Volunteer
cards.text: 15 committees need help — from translation to conference planning.
